content.en:
Ye Tian gave a part of the corpses of the ordinary forbidden zerg to some outstanding Dao ancestors and the leaders of the Nine Extremes Legion of the human race, and asked them to sacrifice the forbidden zerg, so as to gain strength and cultivation amplification effects.

And he himself went to sacrifice the commander-level forbidden zerg and the elite-level forbidden zerg, after the sacrifice, his cultivation speed increased greatly, and his strength also increased a little.

For Dao Ancestors, sacrificing the Forbidden Zerg is undoubtedly one of the fastest ways to improve their cultivation, and there are almost no side effects, and the increase in cultivation speed is almost permanent, which is the most important thing.

It is precisely because of this that the Dao Ancestors are eager to kill the Forbidden Zerg to sacrifice, or to collect the Forbidden Zerg corpse.

And at this time.

Many Dao Ancestors were dissatisfied with the Heavenly Emperor Palace and Black Wind Mountain, and there were other half-step domain ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace and Black Wind Mountain, why didn't they appear, and they had to wait until they were very seriously injured?

If the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain had participated in the battle from the beginning, they might have destroyed the Forbidden Zerg.

However, the people who said these words were basically some stupid or not very strong Dao Ancestors, and Dao Ancestors who really knew a little bit of the situation knew very well that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm had the strength to easily destroy the Forbidden Zerg.

It's just that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm just treats the Forbidden Zerg as a Gu raiser, and is unwilling to destroy the Forbidden Zerg.

As time passed, those Dao Ancestors didn't talk about it, after all, they couldn't resist the Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

The years passed, and in the following days, the major bases completely crushed the Forbidden Zerg, after all, there were two more half-step domain ancestors in the major bases, and they could easily suppress the lord-level Forbidden Zerg of the Forbidden Zerg.

It can be said that as long as a half-step domain ancestor is separated, he can massacre the commander-level taboo zergs.

As a result, the number of taboo zergs decreased dramatically, quickly decreasing to less than 5 million.

And at this time, the half-step domain ancestors rarely made a move, lest the Forbidden Zerg collapse.

In this way, with the passage of 10,000 years and 10,000 years, I don't know how many corpses of the forbidden Zerg were sent into the Xuanxu Ancient Realm for sacrifice, which made the Xuanxu Ancient Realm continue to expand and grow.

During this period, several medium-sized forbidden void realms were also born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Ye Tian snatched a medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm by himself, and snatched another Forbidden Void Realm for Black Wind Mountain, and then did not continue to snatch it.

It's not that he doesn't want to continue to snatch the Forbidden Void Realm, but the rules have changed later, and the major forces have allowed the Invincible Dao Ancestor to snatch it, and Ye Tianke has no choice.

As a result, the Heavenly Emperor Palace snatched a Forbidden Void Realm, and the Heavenly Sea Sect, the Mitian Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple joined forces to snatch a Forbidden Void Realm at a heavy price, and the reason was that two invincible Dao Ancestors were also lost and a top-level forbidden treasure was consumed.

The Forbidden Void Realm that Ye Tian snatched by himself belonged to him completely, and the authority was 100% controlled.

Ye Tian moved the entire human race directly into it, without hiding it at all, and all the major forces knew about it, but with Black Wind Mountain as a backer, other forces did not dare to attack him.

When all the human races moved into the Forbidden Void Realm, Ye Tian arranged a large array to completely transform the Forbidden Void Realm.

At this time, without his permission, even the half-step domain ancestors would not be able to attack the forbidden void realm of the human race, unless the domain ancestor personally intervened.

......

Terran.

Ye Tian is this medium-sized forbidden void realm as the human realm, so it is good to divide the difference from other forbidden void realms, otherwise as there are more and more forbidden void realms, the question of calling them is a small trouble, so it is necessary to name the forbidden void realms one by one.

And the name of the human world has gradually spread to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and has been known by countless forces.

Ye Tian even made it easier for the Dao Ancestors and True Ancestors of the Small Forbidden Void Realm and the Human Realm to come and go freely, he specifically mobilized the permissions of the two Forbidden Void Realms and opened a passage.

Of course, permission was also required to pass through this channel, so he refined some tokens, and only through tokens could he enter and exit the two forbidden void realms.

After the human race stabilized, Ye Tian occasionally hunted the forbidden zerg, but most of the time he spent cultivating.

In the blink of an eye, 300,000 years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Xingyue, Xiao Yue, and Ye Yu have all become supreme Dao Ancestors, and the Terran has also given birth to many Dao Ancestors of the Five or Six Heavens, and even the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors have also given birth to one or two, and the number of Dao Ancestors of the Human Race is too many.

Even almost half of the Nine Extremes Legion are Dao Ancestors, and the others are basically top-level Dao Ancestors, Supreme Dao Ancestors, and Invincible Dao Ancestors.

Of course.

Not only has the strength of the human race increased a lot, but the number of Dao Ancestors of other forces has also increased a lot, and the brilliance is even stronger than that of the Vast Sea Realm, after all, there were no forbidden Zerg sacrifices in the Vast Sea Realm at the beginning, and there were no massive forbidden strange things.

For the vast sea realm at that time, any forbidden and strange thing was precious.

But now, forbidden and strange things seem to have become ordinary resources, so the Dao Ancestors who were born and the Dao Ancestors can not grow fast?

-----------------

"Forbidden Dao Technique: The Dark Extreme Dao Spear has finally entered!"

Ye Tian said happily.

After cultivating for so long, coupled with the cultivation increase of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the assistance of the Forbidden Void Realm, and the effect of the forbidden talent, he had just introduced the cultivation of the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, which showed how difficult it was for the Forbidden Dao Technique to get started!

As far as he knew, the forbidden Dao Techniques of the Migu Dao Ancestors were only in the introductory realm.

However, the Shadow Thorn Forbidden Dao Technique has not yet been introduced, but it is not very far from being initiated.

In addition, he has also created two forbidden dao techniques during this time, one is a speed-type forbidden dao technique-shadow escape, which is the most rubbish forbidden dao technique, after all, he does not have a speed-type forbidden talent, and it is not easy to create this forbidden dao technique.

Another forbidden Dao technique he created was a defensive forbidden Dao technique, the Nine Extremes Armor!

This forbidden Dao technique is also relatively ordinary, but when combined with the forbidden body, it is very powerful.

With the four forbidden dao techniques in his body, Ye Tian's defects have almost been made up, and coupled with the improvement of his cultivation, his combat effectiveness is far from being comparable to before.

Now, if he was allowed to fight with Yan Zu's five supreme Dao Ancestors, he would definitely be able to kill all of them in a short period of time, and even if he fought with that commander-level forbidden zerg again, he would be able to kill the other party without injury.

Today, although he is still the strongest Dao Ancestor in the realm, his combat power is already comparable to the invincible Dao Ancestor who is not weak, and even surpasses the Invincible Dao Ancestor in some directions.

"It's a pity, my Endless Dao is too powerful, I don't know how long it will take to comprehend the Endless Dao to the extreme, fortunately, to become an invincible Dao Ancestor, you don't need to comprehend the Endless Forbidden Dao to the extreme, otherwise there is no hope for a lifetime!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Forbidden Dao is broad and profound, and even the Domain Ancestor can't comprehend it to the extreme, so he doesn't want to comprehend the Endless Forbidden Dao to the extreme, and his current goal is not to comprehend the Forbidden Dao, but to try to comprehend this part of the Endless Dao.
